name: io.github.jarmstrong158/context-keeper-remote
title: Context Keeper (remote)
description: Self-hosted Cloudflare Worker remote backend for context-keeper: a D1-backed, streamable-HTTP MCP endpoint so a second device (e.g. your phone) shares the same project memory. Deploy your own Worker; the URL below is your deployment.

host.description: Your deployed Cloudflare Worker host, e.g. context-keeper-remote.<your-subdomain>.workers.dev

token.description: Your Worker AUTH_TOKEN (set as a Worker secret at deploy time). It is the path credential; keep it private.
